name: awesome-web-security
description: Curated, always-fresh web security learning resources for AI agents and security researchers.

plugins.name: awesome-web-security
plugins.description: Looks up curated web security learning resources (XSS, SQLi, CSRF, SSRF, OAuth/JWT, recon, evasion, tools, CTF). Filters by topic, difficulty, language, and resource type. Returns top references with archive fallbacks. Defensive use only; refuses unauthorized targeting.
